app_discovery_matches_library_handoff_st.name: app_discovery_matches_library_handoff_state_chk
app_discovery_matches_library_handoff_st.value:
("app"."discovery_matches"."library_handoff_status" IS NULL AND "app"."discovery_matches"."library_handoff_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("app"."discovery_matches"."library_handoff_status" IS NOT NULL AND "app"."discovery_matches"."library_handoff_at" IS NOT NULL)

app_discovery_member_decisions_cooldown_.name: app_discovery_member_decisions_cooldown_chk
app_discovery_member_decisions_cooldown_.value:
("app"."discovery_member_decisions"."decision" = 'not_now' AND "app"."discovery_member_decisions"."cooldown_until" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("app"."discovery_member_decisions"."decision" <> 'not_now' AND "app"."discovery_member_decisions"."cooldown_until" IS NULL)

app_discovery_mood_answers_question_answ.name: app_discovery_mood_answers_question_answer_chk
app_discovery_mood_answers_question_answ.value:
(
          "app"."discovery_mood_quiz_answers"."question_key" = 'energy'
          AND "app"."discovery_mood_quiz_answers"."answer_key" IN ('low', 'medium', 'high')
        )
        OR (
          "app"."discovery_mood_quiz_answers"."question_key" = 'commitment'
          AND "app"."discovery_mood_quiz_answers"."answer_key" IN ('short', 'steady', 'epic')
        )
        OR (
          "app"."discovery_mood_quiz_answers"."question_key" = 'vibe'
          AND "app"."discovery_mood_quiz_answers"."answer_key" IN ('laugh', 'think', 'focus', 'flexible')
        )

app_discovery_push_subscriptions_enabled.name: app_discovery_push_subscriptions_enabled_state_chk
app_discovery_push_subscriptions_enabled.value:
("app"."discovery_push_subscriptions"."enabled" = true AND "app"."discovery_push_subscriptions"."disabled_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("app"."discovery_push_subscriptions"."enabled" = false AND "app"."discovery_push_subscriptions"."disabled_at" IS NOT NULL)

app_duos_name_length_chk.name: app_duos_name_length_chk
app_duos_name_length_chk.value: "app"."duos"."name" is null or char_length("app"."duos"."name") between 1 and 48

app_gamification_achievement_catalog_cop.name: app_gamification_achievement_catalog_copy_chk
app_gamification_achievement_catalog_cop.value:
char_length("app"."gamification_achievement_catalog"."title") BETWEEN 1 AND 120
        AND char_length("app"."gamification_achievement_catalog"."description") BETWEEN 1 AND 500
        AND char_length("app"."gamification_achievement_catalog"."icon_key") BETWEEN 1 AND 80

app_gamification_quest_progress_source_s.name: app_gamification_quest_progress_source_shape_chk
app_gamification_quest_progress_source_s.value:
("app"."gamification_quest_progress"."last_source_type" IS NULL AND "app"."gamification_quest_progress"."last_source_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("app"."gamification_quest_progress"."last_source_type" IS NOT NULL AND "app"."gamification_quest_progress"."last_source_id" IS NOT NULL)

app_gamification_quest_templates_seasona.name: app_gamification_quest_templates_seasonal_shape_chk
app_gamification_quest_templates_seasona.value:
("app"."gamification_quest_templates"."quest_type" = 'seasonal' AND "app"."gamification_quest_templates"."seasonal_key" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("app"."gamification_quest_templates"."quest_type" <> 'seasonal' AND "app"."gamification_quest_templates"."seasonal_key" IS NULL)

app_gamification_streak_events_source_sh.name: app_gamification_streak_events_source_shape_chk
app_gamification_streak_events_source_sh.value:
("app"."gamification_streak_events"."source_type" IS NULL AND "app"."gamification_streak_events"."source_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("app"."gamification_streak_events"."source_type" IS NOT NULL AND "app"."gamification_streak_events"."source_id" IS NOT NULL)

app_play_chapters_completion_state_chk.name: app_play_chapters_completion_state_chk
app_play_chapters_completion_state_chk.value:
("app"."play_chapters"."completed_at" IS NULL AND "app"."play_chapters"."completed_by_user_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("app"."play_chapters"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL AND "app"."play_chapters"."completed_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL)

app_play_sessions_active_live_shape_chk.name: app_play_sessions_active_live_shape_chk
app_play_sessions_active_live_shape_chk.value:
"app"."play_sessions"."kind" <> 'live'
        OR "app"."play_sessions"."status" <> 'active'
        OR ("app"."play_sessions"."ended_at" IS NULL AND "app"."play_sessions"."duration_seconds" IS NULL)

app_play_terminal_requests_state_chk.name: app_play_terminal_requests_state_chk
app_play_terminal_requests_state_chk.value:
(
          "app"."play_terminal_requests"."status" = 'pending'
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."confirmed_by_user_id" IS NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."confirmed_at" IS NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."cancelled_by_user_id" IS NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."cancelled_at" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "app"."play_terminal_requests"."status" = 'confirmed'
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."confirmed_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."confirmed_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."cancelled_by_user_id" IS NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."cancelled_at" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "app"."play_terminal_requests"."status" = 'cancelled'
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."confirmed_by_user_id" IS NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."confirmed_at" IS NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."cancelled_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "app"."play_terminal_requests"."cancelled_at" IS NOT NULL
        )

app_push_subscriptions_enabled_state_chk.name: app_push_subscriptions_enabled_state_chk
app_push_subscriptions_enabled_state_chk.value:
("app"."push_subscriptions"."enabled" = true AND "app"."push_subscriptions"."disabled_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("app"."push_subscriptions"."enabled" = false AND "app"."push_subscriptions"."disabled_at" IS NOT NULL)

app_roulette_rounds_resolution_shape_chk.name: app_roulette_rounds_resolution_shape_chk
app_roulette_rounds_resolution_shape_chk.value:
("app"."roulette_rounds"."status" IN ('locked', 'discarded', 'cancelled') AND "app"."roulette_rounds"."resolved_at" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("app"."roulette_rounds"."status" IN ('active', 'revealing', 'pending_invitation'))

catalog_game_localizations_published_rea.name: catalog_game_localizations_published_ready_chk
catalog_game_localizations_published_rea.value:
"catalog"."game_localizations"."status" <> 'published'
        OR (
          "catalog"."game_localizations"."description" IS NOT NULL
          AND char_length(btrim("catalog"."game_localizations"."description")) > 0
          AND "catalog"."game_localizations"."reviewer_kind" IS NOT NULL
          AND "catalog"."game_localizations"."reviewer_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "catalog"."game_localizations"."reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND "catalog"."game_localizations"."published_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND "catalog"."game_localizations"."quality_check" ?& array[
            'coop_facts_checked',
            'spoilers_avoided',
            'facts_not_invented',
            'natural_pt_br',
            'queue2_tone_controlled'
          ]
        )

catalog_games_coop_player_count_chk.name: catalog_games_coop_player_count_chk
catalog_games_coop_player_count_chk.value:
("catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_min" IS NULL AND "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_max" IS NULL)
        OR (
          "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_min" IS NOT NULL
          AND "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_max" IS NOT NULL
          AND "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_min" >= 1
          AND "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_max" >= "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_min"
        )

catalog_games_main_flow_requires_confirm.name: catalog_games_main_flow_requires_confirmed_coop_chk
catalog_games_main_flow_requires_confirm.value:
"catalog"."games"."main_flow_eligible" = false
        OR (
          "catalog"."games"."coop_campaign_confirmed" = true
          AND "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_min" <= 2
          AND "catalog"."games"."coop_player_count_max" >= 2
          AND "catalog"."games"."coop_confirmation_source" IS NOT NULL
          AND "catalog"."games"."coop_confirmation_checked_at" IS NOT NULL
        )
